safety.changesGeneratedPresets: only when global and shader-local Dalapad options are enabled

warnings: Production render-target dependency is disabled by default; debug candidates are optional evidence only.
Diagnostic control pipe can answer ping, self-test, status, and capability queries only.
Resource catalog rows are diagnostic; width, height, format, freshness, and confidence must not be treated as production guarantees.
Debug visualization can upload synthetic pixels or bind addon-owned diagnostic candidate copies; it must not expose raw game handles over IPC.
Realtime uniform movement is reserved but disabled until render-layer validation succeeds.
